title: Contemporary Grey A4 Wooden Picture Frame for A4 (21 x 29.7cm) Photos or Pictures, Plexi Glass, Freestanding or Wall Mounted Landscape or Portrait
features: A contemporary wooden picture frame with a modern 20x15mm (Width, Depth) matte grey profile. Made of MDF, a sturdy and environmentally friendly material.
This photo frame is designed to hold an A4 (21x29.7cm) photo or picture. The overall size of the frame is approximately 24x33cm

Create gallery displays with multiple frames. Think of Family photo collections, memory walls, or a collection of jaw-dropping iconic black-and-white pictures. A fantastic picture frame for your home, office, or as a gift.
Crystal clear and shatter-resistant Plexiglass front. A protective film is applied on both sides – remember to remove the film before use.
Wall-mounted or freestanding. This picture frame has an MDF back panel with pre-attached landscape or portrait orientation hangers and an MDF frame easel for tabletop display.
description: This modern wooden photo frame features a sleek contemporary profile measuring 20mm wide by 15mm deep, crafted from durable MDF with a matte grey finish. Designed to hold an A4-sized picture (8.3 x 11.7 inches, 21 x 29.7 cm), it combines functionality with a clean, elegant style. The shatter-resistant plexiglass front provides lightweight yet durable protection for your photo or document, while the sturdy MDF back panel ensures stability. Pre-attached hangers allow for easy horizontal or vertical wall mounting, making it ideal for displaying certificates, artwork, photos, or special keepsakes. Perfect for home, office, or professional settings, this frame fits seamlessly into any decor. This frame can also be freestanding using the MDF frame easel attached to the back panel.
